fields.name: documentDate
fields.label: Document Date

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ENDDATE FROM C_PERIOD WHERE C_PERIOD_ID = @C_PERIOD_ID@ and periodtype = 'A'),to_date(@HeaderDateDoc@)) FROM DUAL

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ENDDATE FROM C_PERIOD WHERE C_PERIOD_ID = @C_PERIOD_ID@ and periodtype = 'A'),to_date(@HeaderDateDoc@)) FROM DUAL

fields.name: accountingDate
fields.label: Accounting Date

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ENDDATE FROM C_PERIOD WHERE C_PERIOD_ID = @C_PERIOD_ID@ and periodtype = 'A'),to_date(@HeaderDateAcct@)) FROM DUAL

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ENDDATE FROM C_PERIOD WHERE C_PERIOD_ID = @C_PERIOD_ID@ and periodtype = 'A'),to_date(@HeaderDateAcct@)) FROM DUAL

fields.name: period
fields.label: Period

derivation.source: SELECT C_Period_ID FROM C_Period WHERE C_Year_ID IN (SELECT C_Year_ID FROM C_Year WHERE C_Calendar_ID =(SELECT C_Calendar_ID FROM AD_ORG WHERE AD_Client_ID= @AD_Client_ID@ AND AD_ORG_ID=(SELECT AD_ORG_GETCALENDAROWNER( @AD_Org_ID@ ) from dual))) AND to_date( COALESCE(@DateAcct@,@#Date@) ) BETWEEN StartDate AND EndDate AND PeriodType='S' AND exists (select 1 from c_periodcontrol where c_periodcontrol.c_period_id = c_period.c_period_id AND periodstatus = 'O')

fields.defaultValue: @SQL= SELECT C_Period_ID FROM C_Period WHERE C_Year_ID IN (SELECT C_Year_ID FROM C_Year WHERE C_Calendar_ID =(SELECT C_Calendar_ID FROM AD_ORG WHERE AD_Client_ID= @AD_Client_ID@ AND AD_ORG_ID=(SELECT AD_ORG_GETCALENDAROWNER( @AD_Org_ID@ ) from dual))) AND to_date( COALESCE(@DateAcct@,@#Date@) ) BETWEEN StartDate AND EndDate AND PeriodType='S' AND exists (select 1 from c_periodcontrol where c_periodcontrol.c_period_id = c_period.c_period_id AND periodstatus = 'O')

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ENDDATE FROM C_PERIOD WHERE C_PERIOD_ID = @C_PERIOD_ID@ and periodtype = 'A'),to_date(@HeaderDateDoc@)) FROM DUAL
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT ENDDATE FROM C_PERIOD WHERE C_PERIOD_ID = @C_PERIOD_ID@ and periodtype = 'A'),to_date(@HeaderDateAcct@)) FROM DUAL

SELECT C_Period_ID FROM C_Period WHERE C_Year_ID IN (SELECT C_Year_ID FROM C_Year WHERE C_Calendar_ID =(SELECT C_Calendar_ID FROM AD_ORG WHERE AD_Client_ID= @AD_Client_ID@ AND AD_ORG_ID=(SELECT AD_ORG_GETCALENDAROWNER( @AD_Org_ID@ ) from dual))) AND to_date( COALESCE(@DateAcct@,@#Date@) ) BETWEEN StartDate AND EndDate AND PeriodType='S' AND exists (select 1 from c_periodcontrol where c_periodcontrol.c_period_id = c_period.c_period_id AND periodstatus = 'O')

fields.name: lineNo
fields.label: LineNo

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM GL_JournalLine WHERE GL_Journal_ID=@GL_Journal_ID@

fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM GL_JournalLine WHERE GL_Journal_ID=@GL_Journal_ID@

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM GL_JournalLine WHERE GL_Journal_ID=@GL_Journal_ID@
